title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at CL Educate Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at CL Educate Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the CL Educate Digital Technologies family as a Teacher in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CL Educate Digital Technologies:
CL Educate Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate Digital Technologies!
